performance_overview: Through 11 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has 7 signal-bucketed exit events, 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). NOTE: 2 of the 3 wins are the same SNDK position counted twice (the +2 ATR partial AND the final-share stop both log as exits under this system), so it is really the FIRST genuine winning entry, not three independent wins. TODAY 06-15 booked that first genuine signal-driven winner: SNDK long (entry 2056.52, atr%0.338, rsi 59) extended +2.58%, the +2 ATR partial captured +$52.99, and the final share trailed out at 2092.00 for +1.73%/+$35.48 (SNDK round-trip +$88.47). It was paired with another low-ATR noise-stop loss (TSEM 17sh, atr%0.285, stopped 33s after entry, -$54.40/-1.10%) so the day netted only +$34.07/+0.034% while SPY ran +1.73% -- alpha -1.69%, the second straight day Bull's low-ATR names got noise-stopped while the tape rallied. Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -0.5221%, still ahead but the cushion has collapsed from ~+2.27pts to ~+0.46pts as SPY recovered. The realized edge remains selectivity/cash-preservation; execution is finally showing one clean win (SNDK) but the cost of the low-ATR hair-trigger is now eroding the alpha cushion.
overnight_hold_insights: Still ZERO genuine carry-overnight outcomes across all 11 sessions. The overnight_holds.closed_eod bucket now reads 7 trades / 3W / 42.9% / avg +0.15%, but is fully contaminated -- every entry has been closed/stopped intraday or EOD (MPC, MPC-leg, CIEN, WDC, TSEM, and SNDK's two exit legs), none a real overnight carry, and the 3 wins are SNDK's partial, SNDK's final share, and the 06-05 corrective short-cover (i.e. effectively ONE good entry plus a bookkeeping artifact). No gap-risk carry data exists yet. Today the book ended FLAT: SNDK's last share stopped out at 1:13 PM ET (2092.00), so there was nothing to evaluate against the 6 safe-hold gates at the bell. Carry policy unchanged: profitable + trailing-stop-active + price>EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion. Standing lesson reinforced: low-ATR names that don't extend within the session are stopped/scratched before they can ever become carry candidates.
recent_market_context: 2026-06-15 (Mon): VIX calm 16.64. The premarket regime read was DOWN/flat (SPY EMA9 741.07 just under EMA21 741.21) and agents ran regime-down mode (cap 5), but the actual tape was strongly GREEN -- SPY closed +1.73%. This is the 2nd straight session where a flat/down regime read was wrong-footed by a rallying market while Bull's positions got noise-stopped (Thu Bull sat out a +1.77% rip; today low-ATR names stopped out into a +1.73% day). Last 5 sessions: choppy risk-off Wed, then a sustained V-recovery into this week. Watchlist quality stays MODERATE-WEAK -- catalysts are generic Bankrate/NerdWallet/Zacks YTD-momentum boilerplate with no fresh dated news and several implausible NerdWallet monthly-gain figures.
notes_for_next_session: *** STRATEGY PIVOT — READ THIS FIRST *** Effective 2026-06-15 the bot has been rebuilt around a new strategy. The old Perplexity-driven news/sentiment discovery is GONE. Do not look for research.json or sentiment gates — they no longer exist. Here is what changed and how everything now fits together: (1) NEW EVENING SCAN (4 PM ET daily, routines/evening_scan.md): scripts/evening_scan.py screens all 575 S&P 500 + NASDAQ 100 stocks for RS Leader + VCP setups — RS_20day vs SPY > 1.10, VCP ATR ratio < 0.80, within 8% of 52-week high, volume drying up (5d/20d vol < 0.90), EMA-9 > EMA-21 > EMA-50 daily. Top 10 ranked by composite score go to data/watchlist_evening.json. This file is the input for the next morning. (2) PREMARKET SCAN (8:30 AM ET, routines/premarket_scan.md): loads watchlist_evening.json, fetches Finnhub pre-market quotes, sorts by pre-market % change (strongest mover = highest conviction breakout), applies earnings blackout, writes data/watchlist.json. REQUIRES NEW ENV VAR: FINNHUB_API_KEY. (3) ENTRY AGENT (9:31 AM ET, routines/market_open_play.md): new entry window is 9:31-10:30 AM only (was 9:45 AM-1:00 PM). New gates: ATR% >= 0.30 (enforced hard — this was the root cause of all 5 noise-stops), green_on_day, price > VWAP, breakout above prior_day_high OR VWAP reclaim. RSI tightened to 55-65 (was 50-75). RVOL raised to >= 1.3 (was 1.0). prior_day_high comes from watchlist.json (set by evening scan from prev day's high). Sentiment gate REMOVED. (4) ACCOUNT STATE: book is FLAT, zero open positions, ~$99,938.82 cash, dtc 0, not PDT, kill switch NOT active. (5) STILL-OPEN BUGS (unchanged): fill-reconciliation defect (stops that self-fill are not always logged — reconcile broker order history before update_memory); partial-sell does not auto-cancel the protective stop. (6) FIRST STEP FOR EVENING SCAN AGENT: run scripts/build_universe.py to generate data/universe.json before evening_scan.py will work — this is a one-time setup step.
